VAL-PROV-001.title: ProviderTransport trait object safety and Send + Sync bounds
VAL-PROV-001.details: All 3 tests passed. Box<dyn ProviderTransport> compiles and is verified as Send + Sync. CodexProvider itself also verified as Send + Sync. Test command: cargo test --manifest-path shared/rust-bridge/codex-mobile-client/Cargo.toml --lib --no-default-features -- provider_trait_object_safe box_dyn_provider_is_send_sync codex_provider_is_send_sync → result: ok. 3 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 499 filtered out; finished in 0.00s

VAL-PROV-006.title: ProviderEvent round-trips through UniFFI boundary
VAL-PROV-006.details: All 2 tests passed. Every ProviderEvent variant instantiates successfully (UniFFI derive compiles) and all variants survive a serde serialize/deserialize round-trip. Test command: cargo test --manifest-path shared/rust-bridge/codex-mobile-client/Cargo.toml --lib --no-default-features -- provider_event_all_variants_instantiate provider_event_uniffi_serde_round_trip → result: ok. 2 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 500 filtered out; finished in 0.00s

VAL-PROV-007.title: AgentType enum is UniFFI-safe with all required variants
VAL-PROV-007.details: All 3 targeted tests passed (plus 7 additional agent_type-related tests matched by the filter). AgentType has all required variants (Codex, PiAcp, PiNative, DroidAcp, DroidNative, GenericAcp), implements Debug/Clone/Copy/PartialEq/Eq/Hash, serde round-trips correctly, and Display formats as expected. Test command: cargo test --manifest-path shared/rust-bridge/codex-mobile-client/Cargo.toml --lib --no-default-features -- agent_type → result: ok. 10 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 492 filtered out; finished in 0.00s

VAL-PROV-010.title: DiscoveredServer carries detected AgentType
VAL-PROV-010.details: All 4 targeted tests passed (plus 1 additional test). DiscoveredServer defaults agent_types to vec![AgentType::Codex], supports multiple agent types, AppDiscoveredServer conversion preserves agent_types, and round-trip through AppDiscoveredServer preserves agent_types. Test command: cargo test --manifest-path shared/rust-bridge/codex-mobile-client/Cargo.toml --lib --no-default-features -- discovered_server → result: ok. 5 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 497 filtered out; finished in 0.00s

VAL-PROV-014.title: Unknown/unrecognized server events are not silently dropped
VAL-PROV-014.details: All 4 targeted tests passed (plus 3 additional unknown/unhandled tests). ProviderEvent has an Unknown catch-all variant, unhandled notifications map to Unknown rather than being silently dropped, unhandled realtime notifications map to Unknown, and the Unknown variant can be converted back to a raw notification. Test command: cargo test --manifest-path shared/rust-bridge/codex-mobile-client/Cargo.toml --lib --no-default-features -- unknown unhandled → result: ok. 7 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 495 filtered out; finished in 0.01s

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. VAL-PROV-001 (3/3 tests), VAL-PROV-006 (2/2 tests), VAL-PROV-007 (3/3 direct tests), VAL-PROV-010 (4/4 targeted tests), VAL-PROV-014 (4/4 targeted tests). No failures, no blockers, no frictions encountered.
